latestPost.text: “This is a game of inches. And that additional margin is such a massively compounding asset to your competitors over time that taking the bitcoin, holding the optionality on the balance sheet, funding your business with it, and then optimizing a little bit more margin out of that across the Bitcoin and AI/HPC stack allows you to have a competitive advantage.” During @TheBitcoinConf, $CLSK VP of Digital Asset Management @sprainhill discussed how allocating scarce assets can enhance the ability to invest in new infrastructure and pursue opportunities that accelerate value creation.
